description: Ternary with tainted condition and literal branches: only the condition is attacker-controlled, both branches are static HTML. Ternary CFG decomposition routes the condition into control flow (If node's condition_vars) and leaves both branch nodes with empty uses. The phi at the join merges two untainted Const values, so res.send receives no taint.

expected.notes: cond (useCompactBanner) is attacker-controlled but only selects between two static-literal branches; decomposed ternary CFG keeps cond on the If terminator and off branch uses.
